name: Attachment strip
goal: Strip of attachment previews above a chat composer, each with a remove affordance, accepting either a JSON items array or slotted child tiles.
description: Horizontal scrolling row of attachment tiles placed above a chat input. Each tile shows a thumbnail (for images) or a kind icon (file, audio, video, other), the filename, and an optional size label. A ✕ button on each tile fires `ce-attachment-remove`; the host updates its source-of-truth. Accepts data as a JSON `items` attribute (CDR-005 JSON mode) or as slotted custom tiles when `items` is empty (CDR-005 slot mode).

props.name: items
props.description: JSON array of attachment descriptors. When non-empty, JSON mode is used and slotted children are ignored. Each item requires `id` and `name`; `kind`, `thumb`, and `size` are optional.

props.name: removable
props.description: When false, the remove (✕) button is hidden on every tile. Useful for read-only previews.

props.name: compact
props.description: Reduces tile min-width and padding for denser layouts.

events.name: ce-attachment-remove
events.description: Fired when a tile's remove button is clicked. `detail.id` matches the attachment's `id`. The host is responsible for removing the item from its source-of-truth.

slots.description: Custom tile elements used when `items` is empty (CDR-005 slot mode). Each child SHOULD carry a `data-id` attribute so the host can route remove events. The strip wraps them in the same scrolling container.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-1
cssVariables.description: Margin between thumbnail/icon and text body.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-2
cssVariables.description: Gap between tiles and strip vertical padding.

cssVariables.name: --ce-surface-2
cssVariables.description: Icon area and remove button background.

cssVariables.name: --ce-border
cssVariables.description: Tile border and scrollbar thumb color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-radius-sm
cssVariables.description: Thumbnail and icon area border radius.

cssVariables.name: --ce-radius-pill
cssVariables.description: Remove button and scrollbar thumb border radius.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-xs
cssVariables.description: Tile filename and size font size.

cssVariables.name: --ce-muted
cssVariables.description: Tile size label and kind icon color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-line-snug
cssVariables.description: Line height for compact tile text.

cssVariables.name: --ce-focus-ring
cssVariables.description: Focus ring on the remove button.

cssVariables.name: --ce-transition-fast
cssVariables.description: Tile hover and remove button color transition.

a11y.notes: The strip container carries role=list. Each JSON-mode tile has role=group with an aria-label from the filename. The remove button has an aria-label of 'Remove <filename>'. Focus ring is visible on the remove button via :focus-visible.
